title: clerodendrum squamatum var. bethuneanum
intro: Clerodendrum squamatum var. bethuneanum, commonly known as the fragrant glorybower, is a tropical plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic activities, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Clerodendrum squamatum var. bethuneanum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe skin irritations, among others. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
